Pattern to mirror (same as Modules 1-3): brainstorm -> sub-spec (docs/superpowers/specs/) -> plan (docs/superpowers/plans/) -> subagent-driven build on a new branch build/line-increase, two-stage review per task, then stop for user review before --no-ff merge to main.
